tool_use.name: Task
tool_use.param:

session.tool_result:
## Report
**Command 1 - Initial ruff check with fix:** ``` Found 4 errors (4 fixed, 0 remaining). ``` Successfully fixed 4 issues in: - src/erk/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline.py - tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_enhance_with_graphite.py - tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_graphite_first_flow.py - tests/unit/gateways/gt/fake_ops.py
**Command 2 - Verification check across broader file set:** ``` E501 Line too long (101 > 100) --> packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/graphite/real.py:273:101 | 271 | return SubmitStackError( 272 | message=( 273 | "gt submit timed out after 90 seconds. Check network connectivity and try again." | ^ 274 | ) 275 | ) |
Found 1 error. ```
The second check found 1 remaining error in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/graphite/real.py` at line 273 - a line length violation (101 characters exceeds the 100 character limit). This issue is non-fixable with `--fix` as it requires manual editing to break the long line. agentId: ad38e3d (for resuming to continue this agent's work if needed)
session.assistant: Fix the remaining line length issue in `real.py`:

Check network connectivity and try again." 274→ ) 275→ ) 276→ except subprocess.CalledProcessError as e: 277→ if not quiet and e.stdout:

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior. </system-reminder>
